$ bm tool search-notes "durable observation" --project kb-contract-spike --json
Usage: bm tool search-notes [OPTIONS] [QUERY]
Try 'bm tool search-notes --help' for help.
╭─ Error ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ No such option: --json                                                       │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
exit=2
